name: 5f. Chatfuel Lead Capture (TikTok comment + DM, EU-compatible)

nodes.name: Chatfuel Lead Webhook
nodes.notes: Chatfuel External Request sends payload here. Must respond within 10s.

nodes.name: Verify CTA Keyword Match
nodes.notes: Exact match first. Add fuzzy fallback if needed (Levenshtein distance ≤1).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate Payload').item.json.client_id, chatfuel_user_id: $('Validate Payload').item.json.chatfuel_user_id, tiktok_user_id: $('Validate Payload').item.json.tiktok_user_id, keyword: $('Validate Payload').item.json.keyword, email: $('Validate Payload').item.json.email, consent: true, double_opt_in_confirmed: false, payload: $('Validate Payload').item.json.payload }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.EMAIL_PROVIDER_API_KEY, email: $('Validate Payload').item.json.email, tags: [$('Fetch Client Config + Verify Keyword').item.json[0].convertkit_tag_id] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate Payload').item.json.client_id, agent: 'manychat', level: 'info', message: 'Lead captured: ' + $('Validate Payload').item.json.email, payload: { keyword: $('Validate Payload').item.json.keyword, source: 'tiktok_dm' } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={ "messages": [{ "text": "✅ You're in! Check your email for your free resource. Follow the channel for weekly tips." }], "set_attributes": { "lead_captured": "true", "lead_source": "tiktok_chatfuel" } }
={ "messages": [{ "text": "Hmm, I didn't recognize that keyword. Try the exact word from the video!" }] }

_meta.templateNotes: Chatfuel External Request must point to {N8N_URL}/webhook/chatfuel/lead. Must respond within 10s. Kit (ConvertKit) double opt-in must be configured at form level in Kit UI — not enforced here. GDPR: consent column stored, double_opt_in_confirmed updated via ConvertKit webhook when subscriber confirms. Add ConvertKit webhook → Supabase PATCH workflow to update double_opt_in_confirmed=true.
